ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-24-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL SETTING PURSUANT TO CCP 36 (D) WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 8/22/05 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 8/12/05 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY STATED THAT THE CASE IS AT-ISSUE BUT FOR 2 DEFENDANTS WHO WAIVED AT-ISSUE. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE GENERAL ORDER 140 STATEMENT BY 5/26/05. DISMISSALS OF DEFENDANTS NOT IN THE CASE TO BE FILED BY 4:00 P.M. 5/26/05. DEPOSITION OF MR. BAKER TO BE COMPLETED BY 6/13/05, AND DEPOSITION OF MRS. BAKER TO BE COMPLETED BY 6/16/05. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. PARTIES STIPULATE TO G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 6/24/05, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: V. MU/D. LOK; REPORTER: R. SINCLAIR, CSR #1170 (206)
